sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n52785" key="kallwpistei/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καλλωπ-ιστεία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n52785.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">beauty of style, poetica</tr_> <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">κ</itype>. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Serv.</author> </bibl> ad Verg.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Aen.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.223</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
